_meta.description: Declarative active offers — Sales/Appointment Agents read this and surface offers at the right stage. To add/remove an offer: edit this file, no code change required.
notes: applies_to: which Specialist contexts can surface this offer. Values: 'appointment' | 'online_consultation' | 'product_pitch' | 'package_pitch'
trigger_stage: which conversational moment the offer is most relevant — agents use this as a hint, not a hard rule.
Expiry is enforced at read time by the loader. Expired offers are not surfaced.

offers.description_zh: 首次來診所睇症免診金（HK$200 減免）。視診同到診都可以用。
offers.copy_for_writer: 幫你 unlock 咗免診金嘅福利，第一次嚟唔使付診金。

offers.description_zh: 唔方便嚟診所？可以揀網上視診，藥同湯水會直送上門，免運費。
offers.copy_for_writer: 如果嚟唔到診所，我哋有網上視診，洪醫師會視訊幫你睇，藥都會包郵送上門 📦

offers.description_zh: 整套療程（藥膏 / 湯水 / 針灸組合）95 折優惠。
offers.copy_for_writer: 依家買成套療程仲有 95 折，比逐件買抵啲。
